actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjh.wxfp,
       chyjh.chyrq,
       chyjh.order_id,
       chyjhsheet.kpgc,
       chyjhsheet.gcdh,
       chyjhsheet.hyd,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.sid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 事_发票号码
actions.caption: 事_发票号码
actions.expression:
SELECT chyjh.sid,chyjh.chyrq 
FROM chyjh 
WHERE (chyjh.wxfp=[预填费用.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY chyjh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_申请人员
actions.caption: 事_申请人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[预填费用.申请人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

fields.output: 预填费用.货 源 地

actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry,
       chyjhsheet.hyd
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
  AND (chyjh.wxfp=[预填费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (chyjhsheet.sccj1=[预填费用.采购合同.生产厂家]) 
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 事_跟单人员
actions.caption: 事_跟单人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.lxdh 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[预填费用.跟单人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_采购合同.采购合同.付款抬头

fields.output: 预填费用.采购合同.付款抬头
fields.caption: 付款抬头

actions.expression:
select * from (select fktt,0 sort_id from bgmxdsheet where (cght=[预填费用.采购合同.采购合同])
union all 
select fktt,1 sort_id from ytfysheet where cght=[预填费用.采购合同.采购合同] and ifnull(cght,'')<>''
union all
select fktt,2 sort_id from fkspsheet3 where hthm=[预填费用.采购合同.采购合同] 
) a order by sort_id desc limit 1
actions.caption: 事_采购合同.采购合同.付款抬头

actions.expression: select sum(ifnull(gczj,0)) as gczj12 from cymxsheet where (fphm=[预填费用.发票号码]) and (cght=[预填费用.采购合同.采购合同])
actions.caption: 事_采购合同.采购合同.发票出货金额

actions.name: 采购合同编辑框

fields.output: 预填费用.采购合同.采购合同
fields.caption: 采购合同

actions.expression:
SELECT distinct chyjhsheet.cght cght
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   (chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.wxfp=[预填费用.发票号码])
   AND  (chyjhsheet.sccj1 like concat("%", [预填费用.生产厂家] ,"%")) and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)
actions.caption: 采购合同编辑框

actions.name: 事_申请部门
actions.caption: 事_申请部门
actions.expression:
SELECT dyywzm,htbh from ywbdzb where ywb=[预填费用.申请部门]
ORDER BY ywbdzb.sid DESC LIMIT 1

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT chyjhsheet.kpgc
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   ((chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.fphm=[预填费用.发票号码])
   and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)) group by chyjhsheet.kpgc

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%单证%")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm,cyzglsheet.SID
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="预填审批")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC
